goal: Self-host verification: install cnogo into its own repo, validate everything works end-to-end

changes.task: Clean up old scripts/ directory and drop stale stash
changes.notes: scripts/ was already removed in Plan 02. Dropped stale stash@{0} from previous attempt. No orphaned path references found in project files (settings.local.json has historical entries, not tracked).

Added self-host detection (RESOLVED_SOURCE == RESOLVED_TARGET) to skip file copies when installing into the source repo. Self-host mode scans existing files to build MANAGED_PATHS, then generates manifest.json (126 files, 4 categories: managed/seeded/merged/scaffold) and version.json.

changes.task: Final validation pass and update documentation
changes.notes: CLAUDE.md files were already updated in Plan 02. All path references use .cnogo/ prefix. 406 tests pass. Validation clean (warnings only: pre-existing REVIEW schema versions and command word budget).

commitMessage: feat(cnogo-packaging): self-host verification, cleanup, and documentation update
